title: encyclia fragrans subsp. aemula
intro: Encyclia fragrans subsp. aemula is a sub-species of the Encyclia fragrans orchid, a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Encyclia fragrans subsp. aemula include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Encyclia fragrans subsp. aemula is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
